password.title: Use phone and password
password.description: Enter your Konke Smart account. The password is stored in Home Assistant config storage; background password reauthentication is enabled by default so expired cloud tokens can recover automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Konke Smart
reauth_confirm.description: The current credentials are no longer valid. Enter your Konke Smart account again.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your account, password, or token.

abort.already_configured: This Konke home is already configured.
abort.reauth_entry_missing: The Konke config entry to reauthenticate was not found.

execute_scene.name: Execute scene
execute_scene.description: Execute a Konke Smart scene by scene ID.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID when multiple Konke accounts are configured.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID when multiple Konke accounts are configured.

raw_command.name: Raw command
raw_command.description: Send a raw Konke device action. This only works when debug raw command is enabled in integration options.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID when multiple Konke accounts are configured.

action_name.name: Action name
action_name.description: Konke action name, for example TurnOff.

extra.name: Extra
extra.description: Optional extra fields merged into the command body.

list_air_conditioners.name: List air conditioners
list_air_conditioners.description: List Konke air conditioner devices matching the room filters.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional Home Assistant config entry ID. Only needed when multiple Konke accounts are configured.

include_room_names.name: Include room names
include_room_names.description: Only include air conditioners in these room names.

exclude_room_names.name: Exclude room names
exclude_room_names.description: Exclude air conditioners in these room names.

include_room_ids.name: Include room IDs
include_room_ids.description: Only include air conditioners in these Konke room IDs.

exclude_room_ids.name: Exclude room IDs
exclude_room_ids.description: Exclude air conditioners in these Konke room IDs.

include_offline.name: Include offline devices
include_offline.description: Include devices reported offline by Konke.

only_on.name: Only powered-on devices
only_on.description: Only include devices whose cached power state is on.

turn_off_air_conditioners.name: Turn off air conditioners
turn_off_air_conditioners.description: Turn off Konke air conditioners matching the room filters.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional Home Assistant config entry ID. Only needed when multiple Konke accounts are configured.

include_room_names.name: Include room names
include_room_names.description: Only turn off air conditioners in these room names.

exclude_room_names.name: Exclude room names
exclude_room_names.description: Exclude air conditioners in these room names.

include_room_ids.name: Include room IDs
include_room_ids.description: Only turn off air conditioners in these Konke room IDs.

exclude_room_ids.name: Exclude room IDs
exclude_room_ids.description: Exclude air conditioners in these Konke room IDs.

include_offline.name: Include offline devices
include_offline.description: Include devices reported offline by Konke.

only_on.name: Only powered-on devices
only_on.description: Only send turn-off commands to devices whose cached power state is on.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Return matching devices without sending control commands.
